description: Reads a DataMatrix and generates a report suitable for helping with selecting edge score thresholds for similarity networks

parameters.name: Output
parameters.help: Text file to write output to.

parameters.name: Html
parameters.help: html file to write output to.

advanced_parameters.name: Include Mst Knn
advanced_parameters.help: Include projected MST_KNN edge counts and HTML controls. Disabled by default to reduce memory use.

advanced_parameters.name: Merge Impact Metric
advanced_parameters.help: Metric used for split-event plots and tables: 'min_child' emphasizes the smaller cluster breaking away, while 'product' emphasizes balanced large splits.

advanced_parameters.name: Max Merge Events
advanced_parameters.help: Maximum number of strongest merge events to embed in the interactive HTML threshold slider and split plot. Use 0 to include all merge events.

advanced_parameters.name: Progress
advanced_parameters.help: Print live progress updates to stderr during long-running matrix_report stages.

advanced_parameters.name: Profile Stages
advanced_parameters.help: Print per-stage runtime timings to stderr for profiling large matrix_report runs.
